task_summary: Finish the isolated mew-ghost launcher contract: represent mew chat and mew code as explicit commands, keep dry-run as the default, add direct execution only behind an explicit opt-in outside tests, update README examples for safe dry-run and live macOS usage, and leave local dogfood report evidence for the mew-ghost arc.
tests_run: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format state --refresh-count 5 --output /tmp/mew-ghost-sp15-state.json
UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format state --live-active-window --output /tmp/mew-ghost-sp15-live-state.json
rg -n "mew-ghost SP15 launcher contract|mew chat|mew code|dry-run|mew-ghost.sp15.v1" /tmp/mew-ghost-sp15.html
notes: SP15 was completed by mew in successful implementation session #29 after the earlier session #28 rollback/pending approval path. The launcher contract now represents mew chat and mew code as explicit commands, keeps dry-run as the default, and gates direct launcher execution behind the explicit --execute-launchers opt-in. Tests use injected execution rather than real mew subprocesses. README examples cover safe dry-run HTML/state usage and live macOS probe usage. Focused verification passed with 16 tests in the implementation session and in operator review. Automated verification did not perform live macOS launcher execution; that remains an explicit local operator opt-in. Session #30 rewrote only the dogfood report into the canonical side-dogfood schema and validated it by appending to a temporary ledger; operator then normalized the report counters and proof command list before canonical ledger append.
